IDENTITY: Candidate Profile (18316239.pdf)
SUMMARY: Experienced HR professional with a PHR certification and 9 years of HR career. Skilled in project management, staff recruitment & retention, employee relations, benefits administration, and performance management.
SKILLS: Project Management, Finance, Staff Recruitment & Retention, Employee Relations, Alternative Dispute Resolution (ADR), Benefits Administration, HR Program/Project Management, Orientation & OnBoarding, HRIS Technologies, Training & Development, Performance Management, Organizational Development, UltiPro, PeopleSoft Enterprise Human Resources, ADP, MS Office (Word, Excel, PowerPoint, Access, Outlook)
